arts.ttl: Journalist says it ‘seems to be a done deal’ and player is off to Arsenal
arts.sum: Arsenal’s interest in Real Sociedad’s Martín Zubimendi has been repeatedly reported in the UK and Spain. On April 2nd, AS reported the Gunners have informed the midfielder’s entourage of their willingness to activate his €60m clause. It was also stated Real Madrid could snatch him from Arsenal’s clutches. arts.ttl: Crystal Palace in talks to sign ‘talented’ youngster – Contract expires in June, renewal unlikely
arts.sum: Eintracht Frankfurt’s Tamiou Kpebane has emerged as a transfer target for Crystal Palace for the summer window. That’s at least what Fussball Transfers are reporting, and they mention Crystal Palace when covering Hamburger SV’s interest in the 18-year-old. arts.ttl: Memory Lane: Palace's previous Wembley visits
arts.sum: Crystal Palace’s first ever visit to Wembley took place in 1988 - 65 years after the national stadium first opened in 1923. After that long awaited debut, the Eagles have managed to return on plenty of occasions.

arts.ttl: Nico Williams 'key target' for Mikel Arteta but Arsenal suffer Matheus Cunha transfer blow
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta received good and bad news relating to his hunt for a proven striker in the upcoming summer transfer window. The Spanish international still remains a key target according to GIVEMESPORT who also claim from sources that Arsenal are wary of Williams' demands.

arts.ttl: Report: Arsenal register interest in “quality” PL star who’s held talks with Man United
arts.sum: Arsenal have reportedly registered an interest in the potential transfer of Wolves forward and Manchester United target Matheus Cunha. The Red Devils are already said to have held positive talks with Cunha’s camp, so it could be tricky for other clubs to win the race for his signature now. arts.ttl: Revealed: Arsenal & Liverpool still want €80m star after January transfer window talks
arts.sum: Arsenal and Liverpool are understood to still be keen on a potential transfer swoop for Nottingham Forest centre-back Murillo this summer. Sources with a close understanding of the situation have informed CaughtOffside that Murillo is attracting strong interest this summer from a host of top clubs. Arsenal and Liverpool are among Murillo’s main suitors, and […] The post Revealed: Arsenal & Liverpool still want €80m star after January transfer window talks appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Arsenal receive Nico Williams update as Chelsea prepare €50m offer
arts.sum: Chelsea are reportedly preparing a €50 million offer for Como winger Assane Diao in a deal that could boost Arsenal ’s chances of landing Nico Williams . The Spanish outlet claims that Chelsea view Diao as a “promising prospect” and they are reportedly expected to intensify their pursuit ahead of the 2025 summer transfer window as they continue to search for the best young talents in world football.
